themes: Myles Garrett targets Bruce Smith record
writeup: As OTAs wound down at One Bills Drive, analysts published their first post-practice 53-man roster projections, with DJ Moore, Keon Coleman, and Khalil Shakir forming the core of a revamped receiving corps. Off the field, the Bills organization marched in Buffalo's Pride Parade, continuing their commitment to community engagement during Pride Month. On a historical note making the rounds: Cleveland's Myles Garrett is closing in on Bruce Smith's all-time sack record — a reminder of just how dominant the Bills legend was during Buffalo's dynasty years.
